response.reasoning: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Strong TypeScript/Node.js background across multiple roles (re:cinq, Optilyz, RIDE Capital, WatchUp). React experience at Optilyz. MongoDB and SQL experience present. Docker/Kubernetes mentioned via GISCollective. Git proficiency implied across all roles. Current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly matching the AI agent development requirement. BS in Computer Science satisfies education requirement. Has demonstrated TDD/craftsmanship practices (RIDE Capital). Gaps: No explicit Nest.js mention, no explicit Vitest mention (uses other testing tools), no Kotlin experience listed, Java experience is older (2014-2018 era), no explicit AWS/GCP/Azure deep experience beyond AWS CDK at Optilyz. Python not mentioned. Heavy DLang background which isn't directly relevant but shows language versatility. Strong teaching/workshop background indicates communication skills.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js and React background
Current AI-agent and MCP framework work directly matches AI agent development requirement
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, plus teaching/workshop experience
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned in the primary stack
Kotlin missing and Java experience is dated (pre-2018); Python not listed
Limited recent cloud platform depth beyond AWS CDK; no Kubernetes hands-on detail beyond install option

key_factors.factor: Senior-level experience well above 6 years with craftsmanship practices
Missing Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, and Python from required stack

response.justification: Strong senior full-stack candidate with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js/React experience and current AI-agent/MCP work that maps tightly to the role's AI requirement. While specific framework gaps exist (Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin), the depth of engineering practice, language versatility, and craftsmanship orientation suggest these are easily learnable. Worth interviewing to validate framework adaptability and cloud depth.
